Program Overview & Career Trajectory

Why Cloud & DevOps? The Future is in the Cloud

  • High Demand: DevOps Engineers are among the highest paid and most in-demand roles globally.
  • Cloud Adoption & Automation: More companies are migrating to the cloud for scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency. Automation improves delivery speed, reduces system errors, and maximizes productivity.

Your Career Roadmap (Target Job Tracks)

Cloud Support Engineer

Monitor systems, resolve incidents, and manage cloud infrastructure stability.

DevOps Engineer & Admin

Build end-to-end continuous integration pipelines, optimize systems, and containerize runtimes.

Cloud Architect

Establish cloud design parameters, structural data models, configurations, and organizational infrastructure policies.

Technical Syllabus Modules

Modules Syllabus Time
01. Linux Administration Linux Architecture & Systems • Permissions, Users & Groups • Process Handling & Daemons Week 1
02. Networking Fundamentals OSI Architecture & TCP/IP • Subnets & Routing Tables • Firewalls & Ports Management Week 2
03. Git & GitHub Branching, Rebasing & Merging • Stash, Cherry-Pick & Submodules • Git Workflows in Teams Week 3
04. Docker & Containerization Containerization Architecture • Dockerfile Writing Optimization • Multi-Container Docker Compose Week 4
05. Kubernetes Platform Engineering Core & Advanced Operations: Pods, Deployments, Services, Config Maps, Secrets, Ingress Controllers, StatefulSets, DaemonSets & RBAC • Cluster Autoscaling, Node Upgrades & Capacity Provisioning

Production Runtime Tasks: Triage PodCrashLoopBackOff & ImagePullBackOff Errors • Investigating Infrastructure Memory Leak and Engine Failures 		Weeks 5 - 6
06. AWS Cloud Services IAM Policies, Core VPC Structural Designs • EC2 Compute Instances, Auto Scaling, Elastic Load Balancers Week 7
07. Terraform (IaC) Declarative Provisioning, State Backends & Locks • Variable Injection & Multi-Environment Isolation Workspaces Week 8
08. Advanced CI/CD & GitOps GitHub Actions Runners, Artifact Pipelines, Matrix Jobing • Argo CD Continuous GitOps Deployments & Rollbacks Week 9
09. Enterprise Monitoring Stack Metrics Ingestion & Aggregations via Prometheus • Dashboard Building & Alert Routing in Grafana & Loki Week 10
Capstones & Interview Prep Real-World Production Deployment Pipelines, Infrastructure Automation & Placement Strategy Week 11

Real-Time Projects

Project 1 – Containerized Application Deployment
GitHub ➔ Jenkins ➔ Docker ➔ AWS ECR ➔ AWS EC2
